title: Recon registry entry
description: One self-contained deployable contract (a project harness or a standalone mock). Single contract only — a project is one self-contained Setup-style harness, never a multi-contract manifest.

name.description: Unique entry name (also the file name and the deploy-by-name key).

description.description: One-line summary of what it stands up / does.

author.description: Optional attribution, e.g. "Jane Doe <jane@example.com>" (name required, email optional).

tags.description: Discovery tags, e.g. erc4626, vault, lending, oracle, harness, mock.

abi.description: Standard Solidity ABI (JSON). Needed to encode constructor args and interact.

creationBytecode.description: Linked creation (init) bytecode. Self-contained — embeds any `new`'d deps. Must be non-empty and fully library-linked (no __$ placeholders).

source.description: Inlined Solidity source so humans and the LLM operator can see exactly what the contract does.

solc.description: solc version the bytecode was built with. CI recompiles `source` with this and asserts the bytecode matches (reproducibility = trust; no per-entry provenance).
